concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive allegations about advisor Chao Huang regarding academic integrity (purchasing Github stars) and student interactions (threatening critics via Xiaohongshu private messages, deleting comments), replacing them with a softened rebuttal. This appears to suppress legitimate observations about the advisor's conduct rather than perform cleanup (typos, blanks, off-topic content).
concerns.excerpt: 买Github stars的事情能不能解释一下？ 删评论算什么本事？ 敢做不敢当是吧，之前还小红书私信威胁别人质疑，别人质疑你就删评论堵嘴。敢不敢正面回应？
